response.original_title: How do I cancel my Norton LifeLock subscription? ((Fix~Support))
response.overview: To cancel your Norton LifeLock subscription, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 first log into your Norton account through a web browser, not the mobile app, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 as the app often hides or removes cancellation buttons entirely, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 once logged in, go to the "Subscriptions" or "My Billing" page and look for "Turn Off Auto-Renewal" or "Cancel Subscription," 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 if you find these options, click through, confirm your cancellation, and save the confirmation page as a screenshot, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 however, many Norton LifeLock users report that the online cancellation button is missing, grayed out, or simply does nothing when clicked, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 if this happens, you must call Norton customer support directly at 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468
response.title: How do I cancel my Norton LifeLock subscription? ((Fix~Support))
